hf.title: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget
hf.abstract: A growing gap separates inference context lengths from RL post-training: inference systems are approaching million-token contexts, while post-training workloads often remain at 256K tokens or below and rely on length generalization at deployment. The gap is especially important for AI agents, whose observations, tool outputs, documents, and prior decisions accumulate over long trajectories. LongStraw is an architecture-aware execution stack for million-token RL post-training under a fixed GPU budget, instantiated with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). It evaluates the shared prompt wi …
hf.titleZh: LongStraw：在固定GPU预算下超越200万Token的长上下文RL
hf.summaryZh: 推理上下文长度逼近百万级Token，而RL后训练仍局限在256K Token以内，导致AI智能体等长轨迹场景存在显著差距。LongStraw在固定GPU预算下构建结构感知执行栈，结合分组相对策略优化（GRPO），实现超200万Token的长上下文RL后训练。该方法使RL能够直接在百万级上下文中优化策略，避免对长度泛化的依赖，特别适用于长期观察、工具调用与决策累积的AI智能体场景。

hf.title: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding
hf.abstract: Recent advances in video understanding have spanned motion, long video, and streaming interaction, driving this field toward real-world applications. Despite this progress, current open-source models remain limited in several ways. They often struggle to generalize across diverse video types, making them effective only in specific domains. High computational demands further restrict their efficiency and scalability. Moreover, most models are only partially open, with key components such as training code, strategy, or datasets unavailable, which hinders reproducibility and slows community-drive …
hf.titleZh: VideoChat3：面向高效通用视频理解的全开源视频多模态大语言模型
hf.summaryZh: 针对现有视频理解模型泛化能力有限、计算开销大且开源不完整的问题，VideoChat3 构建了完全开放的多模态大语言模型，通过高效架构与统一训练策略处理多种视频类型。该模型在多个基准上取得先进结果，同时显著降低计算需求，提供了包括代码、数据在内的完整资源，推动可复现的视频理解研究。

hf.title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
hf.abstract: Large language models are increasingly trained as interactive agents for long-horizon tasks involving multi-turn interaction, tool use, and environment feedback. Outcome-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a practical optimization paradigm, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards offer limited guidance on intermediate decisions, leaving a supervision gap between episode-level outcomes and token-level policy learning. We propose SEED (SElf-Evolving On-Policy Distillation), a self-evolving framework that converts completed on-policy trajectories into training-time hindsight skills and dis …
hf.titleZh: SEED：面向智能体强化学习的自进化在线策略蒸馏
hf.summaryZh: 针对基于结果的强化学习中轨迹级奖励稀疏、难以提供中间决策指导的问题，SEED 框架将已完成的在线策略轨迹转化为训练时的后见技能，通过自演进在线策略蒸馏为令牌级策略学习提供密集监督信号。该方法弥合了回合级结果与细粒度学习之间的鸿沟，提升了长周期交互任务中智能体策略优化的效率和效果。适用于需要多轮交互和工具使用的语言模型智能体训练场景。

hf.title: SearchOS-V1: Towards Robust Open-Domain Information-Seeking Agent Collaboration
hf.abstract: Recent advances in Tool-Integrated Large Language Models have made web search a core capability of information-seeking agents. However, as interaction histories grow, agents increasingly struggle to track task progress. When search attempts fail to yield useful evidence, current single- and multi-agent systems can become trapped in repetitive loops, wasting search budgets and ultimately compromising the quality and completeness of the final output. We introduce SearchOS, a system-level multi-agent framework that turns fragile, implicit search progress into explicit, persistent, and shared stat …
hf.titleZh: SearchOS-V1：迈向稳健的开放域信息检索智能体协作
hf.summaryZh: 随着交互增长，开放域信息检索智能体因无法有效跟踪搜索进度，一旦搜索失败便容易陷入重复循环，浪费预算并影响最终输出质量。SearchOS框架通过引入显式、持久且共享的搜索状态，使多个智能体能够基于同一进度视图协调行动，从而避免重复尝试并确保搜索过程高效推进。该方法从系统层面提升了多智能体协作的鲁棒性，为构建可靠的开放域信息检索系统提供了新思路。其设计可应用于需要深度搜索与协作的智能助手、研究辅助工具等场景。

hf.title: BadWAM: When World-Action Models Dream Right but Act Wrong
hf.abstract: World-action models (WAMs) are emerging as a promising foundation for embodied control: rather than predicting actions alone, they learn representations that couple action generation with future world prediction. This coupling is often viewed as a source of robustness, interpretability, and safety, as a robot's action can in principle be checked against its imagined future. In this paper, we show that this assumption is fragile. We introduce BadWAM, a unified framework for modeling and evaluating World-Action Drift Attacks: a new class of WAM-specific adversarial attacks that use small visual …
hf.titleZh: BadWAM：当世界-行动模型梦想正确却行动错误时
hf.summaryZh: 针对世界-行动模型（WAM）中行动生成与未来预测耦合的鲁棒性假设，提出统一攻击框架BadWAM，通过微小视觉扰动构造世界-行动漂移攻击，使模型在世界预测看似合理时产生错误行动。实验表明，此类攻击能以低代价绕过基于未来想象的校验机制，导致灾难性控制失败。成果揭示了WAM在具身控制场景中的安全脆弱性，为模型鲁棒性评估与防御提供了新视角。

hf.title: KeyFrame-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Keyframe-Conditioned Video Generation
hf.abstract: Video generation increasingly relies on keyframe-based workflows, where creators specify a sequence of reference images to guide generation. Although recent models support multi-keyframe conditioning, it remains unclear whether they can faithfully reproduce the prescribed keyframes while maintaining overall video quality. We present KeyFrame-Compass, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating keyframe-conditioned video generation. The benchmark contains 386 carefully curated samples spanning three application domains, two video structures, two prompt granularities, two conditioning forma …
hf.titleZh: KeyFrame-Compass：面向关键帧条件视频生成的全面评估
hf.summaryZh: 针对关键帧条件视频生成中模型能否忠实还原参考图像并保持整体质量不明确的问题，构建了首个全面基准KeyFrame-Compass，包含386个精心筛选的样本，涵盖三个应用领域、两种视频结构、两种提示粒度和两种条件格式。该基准系统评估模型的关键帧一致性与视频质量，揭示了现有方法在关键帧还原上的性能差距，为关键帧条件视频生成研究提供了标准化的评测工具。

hf.title: From Pixels to States: Rethinking Interactive World Models as Game Engines
hf.abstract: Building interactive worlds that respond coherently to player actions has long been a shared goal of computer graphics, games, and artificial intelligence. Recent video generative models provide a data-driven route toward this goal by predicting future observations conditioned on user actions, and are increasingly regarded as potential next-generation game engines. Realizing a genuinely interactive game world, however, requires interaction outcomes that follow rules over evolving game conditions, consequences that persist over long horizons, and a generation loop that operates in real time. Co …
hf.titleZh: 从像素到状态：重新思考作为游戏引擎的交互式世界模型
hf.summaryZh: 构建能实时、一致响应玩家动作的交互式世界是计算机图形学、游戏和人工智能的共同追求。现有视频生成模型尝试根据用户动作预测未来帧，但难以保证长期交互的规则一致性与实时性。本工作将交互式世界模型重新构想为游戏引擎，核心是从像素生成回归到状态建模，通过联合训练状态编码器、动力学模型和渲染器，使模型能在紧凑状态空间中演化游戏逻辑并生成高保真画面。在模拟环境中，该方法实现了连贯的长程交互，推理速度满足实时要求，为下一代数据驱动游戏引擎提供了可行路径。

hf.title: MultiRef-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Multi-Reference-to-Audio-Video Generation
hf.abstract: Multi-reference-to-audio-video (MR2AV) generation aims to generate coherent audio-video content conditioned on multiple references and textual instructions. Existing benchmarks mainly focus on text-driven generation, single-reference subject preservation, or isolated audio-video alignment, leaving the emerging MR2AV setting largely unexplored. Compared with these settings, MR2AV requires models to jointly reason over multiple references while generating synchronized visual and audio content. Models must not only preserve each reference faithfully but also correctly bind and compose multiple re …
hf.titleZh: MultiRef-Compass：迈向多参考到音视频生成的全面评估
hf.summaryZh: 针对多参考到音视频生成（MR2AV）缺乏全面评估的问题，构建了MultiRef-Compass基准，覆盖多参考绑定、组合性与音画同步等维度。该基准包含多样的测试样本与自动化指标，用于衡量模型在同时保持参考忠实度与跨模态对齐上的能力。实验揭示现有模型在复杂多参考场景下表现不足，为未来模型设计提供方向。

hf.title: Concurrent Image Understanding and Generation: Self-Correcting Coupled Markov Jump Processes
hf.abstract: Human cognition does not separate understanding and generation. A teacher at a whiteboard speaks and draws together, each modality reshapes the other. In this paper, we bring this coupled loop to artificial systems. Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) are ideally suited to this task, yet existing samplers either decode text and image interleavedly or independently update them in parallel branches that share only previous-step history, but not the other modality's latest decisions within the same step; combined with MDMs' inability to remask, cross-modal contradictions are neither detected nor repai …
hf.titleZh: 并发图像理解与生成：自校正耦合马尔可夫跳跃过程
hf.summaryZh: 针对掩码扩散模型在并发图像理解与生成任务中无法跨模态实时纠错的问题，提出一种自校正耦合马尔可夫跳跃过程，使图像与文本的推理在同一迭代步内相互参照并修正。该方法在ImageNet、COCO等多模态基准上取得了领先的生成质量与理解精度，验证了耦合机制的有效性。为多模态实时交互系统提供了新的技术路径。

hf.title: UniVR: Thinking in Visual Space for Unified Visual Reasoning
hf.abstract: Learning broad world knowledge directly from raw visual data is a fundamental capability of intelligence. We introduce UniVR, the first investigation into simultaneously learning complex reasoning, fine-grained physical dynamics, and long-term planning from pure visual demonstrations. At its core, UniVR features VR-GRPO, a reinforcement learning paradigm with complementary global and step-level rewards. This approach enforces logical coherence and physical consistency throughout the reasoning process without requiring task-specific heuristics or image-text pairs. To train and evaluate UniVR, w …
hf.titleZh: UniVR：在视觉空间中思考以实现统一视觉推理
hf.summaryZh: 从原始视觉数据直接学习世界知识是智能的核心能力。UniVR首次探索从纯视觉演示中同时学习复杂推理、细粒度物理动态和长期规划。其核心VR-GRPO是一种强化学习范式，通过互补的全局与步骤级奖励，在不依赖任务特定启发式或图文对的情况下，强制推理过程保持逻辑连贯与物理一致性。

hf.title: RxBrain: Embodied Cognition Foundation Model with Joint Language-Visual Reasoning and Imagination
hf.abstract: Embodied cognition requires agents to connect high-level task reasoning with the physical states to be achieved. We introduce Hy-Embodied-RxBrain, an embodied cognition foundation model with joint language-visual reasoning and imagination. Unlike vision-language models that emphasize scene understanding and textual decision making, or generative world models that mainly predict future visual states, RxBrain represents embodied plans in a single planning sequence where language and visual imagination play complementary roles. Language provides the abstract structure of a plan, including task de …
hf.titleZh: RxBrain：联合语言-视觉推理与想象的具身认知基础模型
hf.summaryZh: 具身认知要求智能体将高层任务推理与物理状态相连接，但现有视觉语言模型偏重语言决策，世界模型偏重视觉预测。RxBrain提出联合语言-视觉推理与想象的规划序列，语言提供任务分解等抽象结构，视觉想象生成未来状态细节，二者互补。该模型统一了规划中的推理与想象，为复杂物理环境下的具身智能体提供了更全面的认知基础。

hf.title: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging
hf.abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a standard post-training recipe for large language models, but dense full-parameter updates create two deployment-relevant bottlenecks: suppressed reasoning performance, often reflected by premature saturation of test-time scaling, and interference when consolidating multiple capabilities through multi-domain training or model merging. We show that the reasoning-effective component of these updates is largely concentrated in the base model's spectral space, motivating Subspace-Aligned Rewiring (SAR), a post-hoc editing method that retains this spectral core wh …
hf.titleZh: 频谱重连：用于探索、纯化与模型合并
hf.summaryZh: 大模型强化学习中的全参数更新易导致推理性能下降（如测试时缩放过早饱和）及多能力融合时的干扰。这些更新中的关键推理成分集中于基模型的频谱空间，由此提出子空间对齐重连（SAR），一种事后编辑方法，通过保留频谱核心实现有效重连。SAR能缓解推理退化与冲突，支持模型探索、知识纯化与多模型合并，为多领域模型整合等场景提供了新方案。

hf.title: RoboTTT: Context Scaling for Robot Policies
hf.abstract: Recent robot foundation models operate with single-step or short-history visuomotor context. We introduce Test-Time-Training Robot Policies (RoboTTT), a robot model and training recipe that scale visuomotor context to 8K timesteps, three orders of magnitude beyond state-of-the-art policies, without growing inference latency. At this context length, we unlock new robot capabilities: one-shot in-context imitation from human video demonstrations, on-the-fly policy improvement, robustness to perturbations, and stronger performance on multi-stage, long-horizon tasks. We also observe, for the first …
hf.titleZh: RoboTTT: 机器人策略的上下文扩展
hf.summaryZh: 现有机器人视觉运动策略仅使用单步或短历史上下文，RoboTTT通过测试时训练将上下文扩展至8000个时间步，且不增加推理延迟。这一扩展使机器人能一次性模仿人类视频演示、在线改进策略、抵御扰动，并在多阶段长时域任务上取得更强性能。该工作为通用机器人策略的长时间上下文建模提供了新范式。

hf.title: Demystifying On-Policy Distillation: Roles, Pathologies, and Regulations
hf.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a key paradigm in LLM post-training, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. We present a systematic study examining the role, pathologies, and regulations of OPD. We first clarify the role of OPD as an exploration catalyst: it steers the student toward correct reasoning paths via dense token-level guidance, without expanding capability ceiling. We confirm this by showing that prompt diversity matters more than per-problem sampling numbers, and critically, that the effectiveness of OPD hinges entirely on the quality of its guiding signal. Thi …
hf.titleZh: 揭秘在线策略蒸馏：角色、病理与调控
hf.summaryZh: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）已成为大型语言模型后训练的重要方法，但其训练动力学始终模糊不清。系统剖析OPD的角色定位、潜在病态及调控手段，发现其扮演探索催化剂，以稠密的token级信号引导学生模型走向正确推理路径，但不会拓展能力天花板。实验证明，提示多样性远比每个问题的采样数量关键，且OPD的成效完全取决于教师引导信号的质量。研究还识别出错误累积、信号坍塌等病态，并提出温度调节、自适应权重等调控方案，为高效知识蒸馏与模型推理性能提升提供了理论依据和实用指南。

hf.title: Video = World + Event Stream
hf.abstract: We present Wan-Streamer v0.3, which reframes our native-streaming interaction model under a single organizing view: a video is a world plus an event stream. The world is the persistent context in which a video unfolds, including the environment, scene, subjects, ambient acoustic conditions, voice characteristics, and other relatively stable conditions. The event stream is everything that changes over time within that world, including scene or environmental changes, subject behavior, speech, and other sounds. This yields a general-purpose pretraining task over large amounts of real video: given …
hf.titleZh: 视频 = 世界 + 事件流
hf.summaryZh: Wan-Streamer v0.3 提出将视频分解为持久世界上下文和随时间变化的事件流：世界包含环境、场景、主体等稳定因素，事件流涵盖行为、语音、声音等动态变化。基于此构建通用预训练任务，给定世界信息预测事件流，从大规模真实视频中学习，为原生流式交互模型提供有效训练范式。

hf.title: WanSong v1.0 Technical Report
hf.abstract: Music generation foundation models have recently attracted significant industry attention. However, achieving efficient generation and high-fidelity long-form audio while supporting controllability remains challenging. To address these needs, we present WanSong, a simple yet powerful approach for long-form, commercial-grade song generation. Unlike autoregressive (AR) and cascaded multi-stage pipelines (\eg, AR followed by diffusion), WanSong is a pure diffusion-based model that directly generates high-fidelity, multilingual songs up to 5 minutes and outputs dual stems (vocals and background mu …
hf.titleZh: WanSong v1.0 技术报告
hf.summaryZh: 音乐生成基础模型近期备受业界关注，但兼顾高效生成、高保真长音频与可控性仍具挑战。WanSong采用纯扩散模型，直接生成长达5分钟的高保真多语言歌曲，并输出人声与背景音乐双轨，跳过了自回归或级联式多阶段流程。该方案简化了商业级长歌曲的生成过程，为音乐生成提供了一种高效简洁的途径。

hf.title: MeanFlowNFT: Bringing Forward-Process RL to Average-Velocity Generators
hf.abstract: MeanFlow generators achieve fast few-step sampling by predicting average velocities over time intervals, making them attractive for efficient generation. Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a powerful way to align diffusion and flow models with human preferences and task-specific objectives. In particular, DiffusionNFT offers an efficient forward-process RL framework that does not require reverse-process trajectories or likelihood estimation. However, applying such RL methods to MeanFlow remains underexplored. DiffusionNFT optimizes instantaneous velocities, whereas MeanFlow samples with av …
hf.titleZh: MeanFlowNFT: 将前向过程RL引入平均速度生成器
hf.summaryZh: 平均速度生成器(MeanFlow)通过预测平均速度实现快速少步采样，但前向过程RL在此类模型上的应用存在技术鸿沟。MeanFlowNFT通过基于预测平均速度的策略梯度重参数化与新型KL调度器，弥合了与DiffusionNFT等框架的差异。实验表明，该方法能有效对齐人类偏好及特定任务目标，且仅需少量采样步骤即可取得有竞争力的性能，为高效生成模型的偏好优化提供了实用途径。

hf.title: DeepLoop: Depth Scaling for Looped Transformers
hf.abstract: Looped Transformers scale sequential computation by applying a compact stack of physical blocks for multiple rounds, increasing unrolled depth without increasing stored parameters. This reuse changes the residual-scaling problem: in an untied Transformer, each residual branch receives and applies its own parameter update, whereas in a looped Transformer one shared update aggregates gradients from repeated visits and is read back by those same visits in the next linearized forward pass. We formalize this tied-depth effect through a first-order perturbation bound controlled by a visit-alignment …
hf.titleZh: DeepLoop: 循环Transformer的深度缩放
hf.summaryZh: 循环Transformer通过重复使用物理模块实现深度缩放，但参数共享改变了残差分支的梯度聚合与回读机制。通过一阶扰动界限形式化这种绑定深度效应，并分析访问对齐对训练稳定性的影响，为循环架构的深度缩放提供了理论依据。

hf.title: Smarter and Cheaper at Once: Byte-Exact KV-Cache Grafting Turns a Frozen Small Model into a Verified-Knowledge Flywheel
hf.abstract: We report a way to make a frozen small language model both more capable and dramatically cheaper at once, without changing any weights. Verified knowledge is deposited once as a byte-exact key-value (KV) state artifact and later restored, by graft, into a fresh inference context. The restore is bit-exact: under a pinned deterministic configuration, the grafted logits are byte-for-byte identical to a fresh computation (SHA-256 equality), with zero KL divergence and 100% argmax agreement over fifty samples. We show that own-position graft is the unique numerically exact operating point on a mode …
hf.titleZh: 更聪明更便宜同时实现：字节精确KV-Cache嫁接将冻结小模型变为已验证知识飞轮
hf.summaryZh: 无需修改冻结小语言模型的权重，将验证知识一次性存储为字节精确的键值（KV）缓存状态，随后通过嫁接方式恢复到新的推理上下文，实现与重新计算逐字节相同的 logits（SHA-256 相等）。在 50 个样本上，嫁接恢复的 logits 与原始计算的 KL 散度为零，argmax 一致率达到 100%。该方法使模型同时获得能力提升和推理成本降低，为语言模型的轻量化部署和精确知识注入提供了全新方案。

hf.title: Partition, Prompt, Aggregate: Statistical Self-Consistency in Language Models
hf.abstract: In-context learning is commonly interpreted as a form of conditional inference, in which the prompt specifies a context and the model's output is treated as an estimate of the corresponding conditional distribution. If this interpretation holds, then LLM estimates should satisfy basic probabilistic identities. In particular, the law of total probability asserts that prior-weighted conditional distributions aggregate into population-level marginals over any valid partition of the population. In this work, we investigate to what extent LLM estimates adhere to this self-consistency principle. We …
hf.titleZh: 分区、提示、聚合：语言模型中的统计自洽性
hf.summaryZh: 探究大语言模型在上下文学习中的条件推理是否满足全概率公式所要求的自洽性。通过设计分区提示聚合方法，检验LLM对条件分布的估计能否按先验加权正确聚合为总体边缘分布。实验表明，直接提示常导致偏离自洽性，而引入分区提示聚合策略可有效提升模型校准质量。这一发现对构建可靠的概率推理系统具有参考意义。

hf.title: VIABench: A Comprehensive Video Benchmark Collected from Blind Individuals for Visual Impairment Assistance
hf.abstract: Visually impaired individuals (VIIs) encounter significant daily challenges due to limited access to visual information. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive results on general vision and language tasks, their practical utility in real-world blind assistance still remains largely underexplored. To fill this gap, we introduce VIABench, a comprehensive video benchmark specifically designed to evaluate MLLMs in Visually Impaired Assistance scenarios using first-person videos recorded or shared by VIIs themselves. VIABench defines three core tasks, each target …
hf.titleZh: VIABench：一个由盲人收集的面向视障辅助的全面视频基准
hf.summaryZh: 针对多模态大语言模型在真实视障辅助场景中实用性评估缺失的问题，构建了VIABench视频基准，采用盲人录制或分享的第一人称视频，定义三大核心任务（涵盖场景理解、导航与物体识别等）。评估显示当前主流多模态模型在该基准上表现远逊于人类，尤其缺乏细粒度视觉问答与长视频推理能力。该基准为辅助技术研发提供了更贴近真实需求的评测平台。

hf.title: SUFLECA: Scaling Up Feature Learning for CAD-to-image Alignment
hf.abstract: CAD-to-image alignment aims to estimate an object's 9D pose (rotation, translation, and anisotropic scale) from a single RGB image, enabling applications in robotics and augmented reality. Recent zero-shot methods use visual foundation models to match image regions to CAD models, yet typically their correspondences are appearance-driven and degrade under occlusion or sim-to-real domain shift. To address these limitations, we introduce SUFLECA (Scaling Up Feature LEarning for CAD Alignment), a weakly-supervised framework for zero-shot CAD alignment with two key contributions. First, SUFLECA sca …
hf.titleZh: SUFLECA: 扩展特征学习以实现CAD到图像对齐
hf.summaryZh: 针对零样本CAD到图像对齐中基于外观的对应关系在遮挡和域偏移下性能下降的问题，提出弱监督框架SUFLECA，通过扩展特征学习增强图像与CAD模型的匹配鲁棒性。核心贡献包括大规模特征预训练与几何感知对齐机制，在挑战性场景下显著提升了9D姿态估计精度，适用于机器人与增强现实等应用。

hf.title: Rethinking the Evaluation of Harness Evolution for Agents
hf.abstract: We revisit the evaluation of automatic harness evolution for LLM agents. Existing harness evolution methods use unit test cases to search for harness configurations and then report final performance on the same public benchmark. This protocol raises two fundamental concerns. First, harness evolution is itself an iterative search procedure that repeatedly evaluates and revises candidate harnesses using task feedback. As in agentic test-time scaling, it should therefore be compared with simple task-level search baselines under matched feedback and inference budgets to determine whether its gains …
hf.titleZh: 反思代理 Harness 进化的评估
hf.summaryZh: 重新审视自动 harness 进化方法的评估协议，指出现有做法在相同公开基准上通过单元测试搜索配置并报告性能，既未与任务级搜索基线公平比较，也容易过拟合。提出一套评估原则，要求采用匹配的反馈和推理预算，并强调泛化测试。大规模实验显示，遵循这些原则后，先前报告的性能增益大多消失，为代理自动化优化确立了更严谨的评估范式。

hf.title: AsySplat: Efficient Asymmetric 3D Gaussian Splatting for Long-Sequence Scene Modeling
hf.abstract: Recent generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting models have advanced long-sequence novel view synthesis (NVS), but at the cost of substantial redundant computation. We identify that the redundancy can be mitigated based on two observations: (i) high-precision geometry is not strictly required for high-quality NVS; (ii) appearance learning is generally easier than geometry recovery. Motivated by these insights, we propose an asymmetric architecture that decouples geometry and appearance modeling. The geometry branch processes coarse-grained tokens with most of the parameters for multi-view reconstru …
hf.titleZh: AsySplat：用于长序列场景建模的高效非对称3D Gaussian Splatting
hf.summaryZh: 针对长序列新视角合成中3D高斯泼溅的冗余计算问题，利用高质量外观对几何精度不敏感的特性，提出解耦几何与外观的非对称架构。几何分支以绝大多数参数处理粗粒度标记实现高效多视图重建，外观分支则轻量化学习，显著降低计算开销。在多个长序列场景上验证，该设计在保持渲染质量的同时大幅提升效率，适用于大规模场景的实时新视角生成。

hf.title: GRASP: GRanularity-Aware Search Policy for Agentic RAG
hf.abstract: Agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) extends static RAG by allowing language models to iteratively reason, generate search queries, retrieve evidence, and predict answers. However, it remains challenging for models to decide when to retrieve, whether to use lexical matching or semantic similarity, and how to control context granularity to prevent irrelevant tokens from interfering with agent reasoning. In this paper, we introduce GRASP, a reinforcement learning (RL) framework for training agents to adaptively coordinate complementary retrieval tools during multi-step reasoning. GRASP p …
hf.titleZh: GRASP：面向Agentic RAG的粒度感知搜索策略
hf.summaryZh: 解决Agentic RAG中检索时机、匹配方式与上下文粒度难以自适应协调的问题。提出基于强化学习的GRASP框架，训练智能体在多步推理中动态决定是否检索、选择词汇或语义匹配、并控制返回证据的粒度，以排除无关信息干扰。实验证明该方法能有效提升复杂知识密集型任务的推理准确性与效率。

hf.title: Token Time Continuous Diffusion for Language Modeling
hf.abstract: In this paper we introduce token time continuous diffusion (TTCD), a new diffusion language model which (a) operates in continuous space, deterministically mapping Gaussian noise to a final token canvas with no further sampling, and crucially (b) incorporates a new notion of per-token times, with some tokens proceeding from noise to token at a faster rate than others. Continuous space modeling helps TTCD avoid the parallel sampling of multiple tokens, which is a key source of inaccuracy at high speedups for models that iterate purely in discrete space. The notion of per-token times helps TTCD …
hf.titleZh: 用于语言建模的令牌时间连续扩散
hf.summaryZh: 针对离散空间扩散模型在高速采样时因并行生成多令牌而精度下降的问题，提出令牌时间连续扩散（TTCD），在连续空间中从高斯噪声确定性映射至完整令牌序列，并引入每令牌可变速率的解码时间概念。该方法无需额外采样步骤，避免了并行解码的不准确性，显著提升了高倍速生成下的质量与效率，适用于实时文本生成等对延迟敏感的场景。

hf.title: Chat2Scenic: An Iterative RAG-Based Framework for Scenario Generation in Autonomous Driving
hf.abstract: Validating autonomous driving systems requires diverse, regulation-compliant test scenarios. In simulation-based testing, scenarios are defined as executable scripts. Yet automatically generating such scripts from regulatory descriptions remains an open challenge, and existing approaches face fundamental trade-offs. Retrieval-assemble methods achieve reasonable compilation rates but lack scalability, whereas retrieval-based full-script generation suffers from low compilation success rates. We present Chat2Scenic, the first iterative retrieval-augmented framework to generate scenario scripts in …
hf.titleZh: Chat2Scenic: 面向自动驾驶场景生成的迭代式RAG框架
hf.summaryZh: 从法规描述自动生成可执行的仿真测试脚本是自动驾驶验证中的关键难题，现有检索-组装方法可扩展性差，全脚本生成则编译成功率低。Chat2Scenic 是首个迭代式检索增强生成（RAG）框架，通过迭代检索与组装，在保证较高编译成功率的同时提升了可扩展性。实验结果表明，该方法有效克服了传统方案的权衡，适用于大规模、多样化的法规合规场景生成。

hf.title: Hierarchical Denoising For Multi-Step Visual Reasoning
hf.abstract: Video models are evolving into vision foundation models, yet they still lack human-like multi-step reasoning. Streaming autoregressive diffusion models are efficient but limited in reasoning, while bidirectional diffusion enables global revision with high inference costs due to dense frame-level denoising. Both paradigms struggle to achieve logical consistency and low-latency streaming for complex reasoning tasks. We propose HDR (Hierarchical Denoising for Visual Reasoning), a unified framework that integrates hierarchical latents into causal video generation for multi-step reasoning. HDR orga …
hf.titleZh: 面向多步视觉推理的层次化去噪
hf.summaryZh: 针对视频模型缺乏类人多步推理能力，流式自回归扩散效率高但推理受限、双向扩散可全局修正但推理成本高的问题，提出统一框架HDR，将层次化潜变量融入因果视频生成，实现高层规划与细节去噪的解耦。该框架在保留低延迟流式生成的同时支持回溯修正，在复杂推理任务中兼顾了逻辑一致性与效率，为实时视觉推理应用提供了新路径。

hf.title: On Locality and Length Generalization in Visual Reasoning
hf.abstract: A striking feature of the human visual system is that it ingests visual information through a series of local foveated glimpses, rather than a single global computation. This makes human vision distinctly different from most popular computer vision models in use today, which input images globally and in a single shot. A natural question therefore is whether local, sequential vision models may provide any fundamental computational benefits in addition to being biologically more plausible than global models. In this work, we investigate this question from the perspective of visual state tracking …
hf.titleZh: 视觉推理中的局部性与长度泛化
hf.summaryZh: 人类视觉通过局部注视序列处理信息，而现有视觉模型多采用全局一次性计算。从视觉状态追踪角度考察局部序列模型的计算优势。结果表明，局部模型在长度泛化上显著优于全局模型，逐步注视机制提升了视觉推理的鲁棒性。

arxiv.title: PagedWeight: Efficient MoE LLM Serving with Dynamic Quality-Aware Weight Quantization
arxiv.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) is a popular class of large language models (LLMs), offering high efficiency and accuracy. However, in KV-cache-intensive serving scenarios, MoEs often exhibit a tension between the GPU memory requirements of the model weights and the growing KV cache. We propose PagedWeight, a novel management method for MoE LLM serving that dynamically quantizes MoE model's weights at runtime and balances expert-weight precision with the KV cache sizes. PagedWeight exposes and effectively navigates the complex tradeoff between the model's task accuracy, memory consumption, and throug …
arxiv.titleZh: PagedWeight: 动态质量感知权重量化实现高效 MoE LLM 服务
arxiv.summaryZh: 混合专家模型（MoE）在 KV 缓存密集的推理场景中，面临模型权重与 KV 缓存对 GPU 内存的竞争压力。PagedWeight 方法在运行时对 MoE 权重进行动态量化，根据质量需求调整专家权重精度，从而平衡内存占用与推理吞吐。该方法揭示了任务精度、内存消耗与吞吐量之间的权衡关系，并实现有效的多目标优化，适用于大规模 MoE LLM 的高效部署。

arxiv.title: A Blueprint for Equilibrium-Based Differentiable Continuous-Variable Thermodynamic Computing
arxiv.abstract: To address the escalating energy and latency demands of machine-learning workloads, we introduce a blueprint for an energy-efficient and fast thermodynamic computing stack that leverages stochastic analog processes in physical hardware. In this work, we focus on energy-based thermodynamic computing where the stochastic process is well described by Langevin dynamics with tunable energy potentials. The implementation of such potentials in physical hardware enables us to generate and sample from basic parameterized energy-based models. We demonstrate how to construct and train popular classes of …
arxiv.titleZh: 基于平衡的可微连续变量热力学计算蓝图
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对机器学习负载日益增长的能耗与延迟挑战，提出一种基于平衡态热力学过程的可微连续变量计算架构。该方法利用物理硬件中符合Langevin动力学的随机模拟过程来构建可调能量势，实现参数化能量模型的生成与采样，并展示了构建和训练主流能量模型的技术路径。该蓝图为实现高效节能、低延迟的热力学计算硬件提供了可行方案。

arxiv.title: Cluster-Aware Matching via Laplacian Optimal Transport
arxiv.abstract: In many applications of matching, the point clouds to be matched are not merely unstructured sets of points but rather samples from distributions with an intrinsic cluster structure. In such cases, as individual points are often interchangeable within a coherent region, finding a robust region-to-region alignment is more desirable than establishing a precise point-to-point correspondence. To this end, we propose a novel approach for cluster-aware matching based on Laplacian Optimal Transport (LapOT). The key idea is to regularize the optimal transport problem with quadratic Laplacian terms con …
arxiv.titleZh: 基于拉普拉斯最优传输的聚类感知匹配
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对具有内在聚类结构的点云匹配问题，提出基于拉普拉斯最优传输（LapOT）的聚类感知匹配方法，通过在最优传输目标中加入基于图拉普拉斯的二次正则项，显式建模数据聚类划分，促使传输计划保持区域一致性，从而得到稳健的区域到区域对齐。该方法避免了精确点对点对应的脆弱性，更适用于需要捕获整体结构语义的应用场景，如图像配准与形状匹配。

arxiv.title: Physics-enhanced reinforcement learning for real-time optimal control of dynamical systems
arxiv.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has recently emerged as a promising feedback control strategy for nonlinear and complex dynamical systems. However, RL algorithms are sample inefficient and require a large number of interaction with the environment to synthesize optimal control strategies. Consequently, applications of RL are typically limited to sparse sensors and actuators due to the curse of dimensionality entailed by the exploration-exploitation dilemma in high-dimensional spaces. In this work, we bridge RL and traditional optimal control for dynamical system with a novel Physics-EnhAnced Reinf …
arxiv.titleZh: 面向动态系统实时最优控制的物理增强强化学习
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对强化学习在非线性动态系统控制中采样效率低、高维空间探索困难的问题，引入物理增强机制，将传统最优控制理论与策略学习相结合，以物理模型或先验知识引导探索与策略优化。实验表明，该方法显著降低了环境交互需求，在保持实时控制性能的同时缓解了维度灾难。这一思路适用于对数据效率要求苛刻的复杂动态系统最优控制场景。

arxiv.title: Evaluating Open-Weight LLMs for Generating Structured Threat Information for Autonomous Vehicle Vulnerabilities
arxiv.abstract: Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) rely on interconnected software and hardware components, including sensors, Electronic Control Units, in-vehicle infotainment systems, and telematics units, where vulnerabilities can compromise assets, users, and vehicle operations. These vulnerabilities are commonly documented as plain text in the Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) database; however, security practitioners require structured information about affected assets, types of weaknesses, and attack behaviors to effectively mitigate the risks from these vulnerabilities. To this end, we …
arxiv.titleZh: 评估开放权重的大语言模型在生成自动驾驶汽车漏洞结构化威胁信息方面的能力
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对自动驾驶汽车安全漏洞信息多存为纯文本、缺乏结构化描述的问题，利用开放权重LLM结合提示工程与本体驱动的检索增强生成，从CVE记录中自动提取受影响资产、弱点类型和攻击行为。实验表明，Gemma 2 27B在多数类别上F1高达0.87，且效率优于闭源LLM，该方法可提升漏洞分析自动化水平。

arxiv.title: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?
arxiv.abstract: Muon is competitive with AdamW in large-scale pre-training, but its value for reinforcement-learning (RL) post-training remains unclear. We study vanilla Muon in sparse-reward agentic RL through matched single-seed comparisons with AdamW on ALFWorld using Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct. Under Group-in-Group Policy Optimization (GiGPO), applying Muon only to hidden weight matrices raises final-window validation success from 0.290 to 0.546 (+88%); high-rate AdamW controls retain no post-update success. The effect depends on the advantage estimator and learning rate. At 3e-5, Muon improves GRPO from 0.161 …
arxiv.titleZh: Muon 何时有助于智能体强化学习？
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对Muon优化器在智能体强化学习（RL）后训练中的价值不明确的问题，在稀疏奖励的ALFWorld环境使用Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct模型进行GiGPO策略优化，仅对隐藏权重矩阵应用vanilla Muon。相比AdamW，最终窗口验证成功率从0.290提升至0.546（相对提升88%），而高学习率AdamW无法获得有效更新。效果对优势估计器和学习率敏感，表明Muon在适当配置下可显著提升语言模型智能体RL微调的性能。

arxiv.title: Behaviour-Conditioned Neural Processes for Adaptive Residential Short-Term Load Forecasting
arxiv.abstract: Residential short-term load forecasting (STLF) is challenging because household demand is heterogeneous, temporally variable, and shaped by diverse behavioural routines. This work investigates whether inferred behavioural structure can be embedded within the forecasting mechanism of a Neural Process-based probabilistic model, rather than used only as an external grouping signal, for context-conditioned residential STLF. We propose a behaviour-conditioned Attentive Neural Process framework that treats each load profile as a forecasting task. Behavioural structure is represented by a discrete la …
arxiv.titleZh: 行为条件神经过程用于自适应居民短期负荷预测
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对居民短期负荷预测中家庭用电行为异质性强、时序多变的问题，提出行为条件注意力神经过程框架，将每个负荷曲线视为独立预测任务，并通过离散潜在变量编码行为模式，使其作为神经过程上下文条件的一部分，而非仅作为外部分组信息。模型在真实数据集上评估，点预测和概率预测性能均优于多个基线，证明了将行为结构直接嵌入概率预测模型的有效性，适用于个性化需求响应场景。

arxiv.title: An Exam for Active Observers
arxiv.abstract: Human vision is a closed loop: gaze is continuously redirected by intermediate hypotheses rather than a single snapshot. Decades of psychophysics and cognitive science have argued that this active observation is essential for a wide range of tasks. Whether today's multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exercise active observation is an empirical question that current vision-language benchmarks do not answer. We introduce ActiveVision, a benchmark that makes active observation measurable for MLLMs, comprising 17 tasks across 3 categories. Tasks are designed to force repeated visual perception …
arxiv.titleZh: 主动观察者测试
arxiv.summaryZh: 多模态大模型是否具备类似人类的主动观察能力尚缺乏衡量标准。ActiveVision基准包含3大类17个任务，强制模型在决策过程中反复进行视觉感知来评估主动观察行为。测试多个前沿多模态大模型后发现其主动观察能力普遍不足，揭示当前模型的局限。该基准为主动视觉研究提供了可量化的评估工具。

arxiv.title: PRISA: Proactive Infrastructure LiDAR Framework for Intersection Safety Assessment
arxiv.abstract: Urban intersections are among the most hazardous locations in road networks, posing significant risks to vehicles and vulnerable road users (VRUs) such as pedestrians and cyclists. The complexity of multi-agent interactions demands continuous, real-time monitoring systems capable of anticipating conflicts before they escalate into crashes. We present PRISA, a modular infrastructure LiDAR framework leveraging privacy-preserving, low-light-robust roadside sensors for long-term traffic observation and real-time risk detection at the edge. The framework comprises two core components: a sensing and …
arxiv.titleZh: PRISA: 面向交叉口安全评估的主动式基础设施LiDAR框架
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对城市交叉口事故风险高、多智能体交互复杂的问题，提出模块化基础设施LiDAR框架PRISA，利用路边传感器进行长期交通观测与边缘端实时风险检测。该框架包含感知与…等核心组件，具备隐私保护与低光照鲁棒特性，能在冲突升级前预警。该架构适用于智能交通系统，为交叉口安全管理提供了可部署的主动监测方案。

arxiv.title: Learning Standard Model structure from LHC data with Riemannian flow matching
arxiv.abstract: In this work we demonstrate that a single transformer-based generative model can capture Standard Model structure spanning five decades of invariant mass, from the sub-GeV regime to the TeV continuum, a range that no single Monte Carlo sample covers. To achieve this we design \textsc{ShellFlow}, a Riemannian conditional flow matching model that, given the recorded event composition, generates each particle on its on-shell manifold. Its only physics priors are the on-shell condition and the invariant-mass formula. The model is trained on $\sim 10^{9}$ real $pp$ collision events from the ATLAS O …
arxiv.titleZh: 从LHC数据中学习标准模型结构：基于黎曼流匹配
arxiv.summaryZh: 单一蒙特卡洛样本无法覆盖从亚GeV到TeV连续谱的标准模型过程，ShellFlow 通过一个基于 Transformer 的黎曼条件流匹配生成模型，在给定记录的事件组成后于每个粒子的在壳流形上生成粒子，仅以在壳条件和不变质量公式作为物理先验。在约 10^9 个 ATLAS 真实质子-质子碰撞事件上训练后，该模型成功捕获跨越五个数量级不变质量的标准模型结构，为 LHC 物理分析提供了一种统一的高效生成方法。

arxiv.title: Improving Improved Kernel PLS
arxiv.abstract: Improved Kernel Partial Least Squares (IKPLS) algorithms 1 and 2 are among the fastest PLS calibration algorithms. This article focuses on two shared steps, the computation of the $\mathbf{X}$ rotations, $\mathbf{R}$, and the $\mathbf{Y}$ loadings, $\mathbf{Q}$, and accelerates both. For $\mathbf{R}$, term-by-term accumulation is replaced by a direct evaluation strategy that requires the same number of multiplications but parallelizes better on modern hardware. For $\mathbf{Q}$, I identify - to the best of my knowledge, for the first time - equivalences showing that each $\mathbf{Y}$ loading i …
arxiv.titleZh: 加速改进型核偏最小二乘算法
arxiv.summaryZh: IKPLS算法1和2虽为最快的PLS校准算法，但其共享的X旋转矩阵R与Y载荷矩阵Q的计算仍有优化空间。通过以直接求值替代逐项累积来增强并行性，并首次利用Y载荷间的等价关系消除冗余运算。改进后算法在保持相同乘法次数的同时，显著提升了现代硬件上的运行速度，为大规模光谱校准等高维数据分析提供了更高效的核偏最小二乘求解方案。

arxiv.title: When Do Multi-Agent Systems Help? An Information Bottleneck Perspective
arxiv.abstract: LLM powered multi-agent systems (MAS) have emerged as a promising paradigm for complex tasks. However, their advantages over single-agent systems (SAS) remain unclear, with performance varying inconsistently across settings. Here, we provide an information bottleneck perspective on elucidating the differences between MAS and SAS. Specifically, our key observation is that a SAS accumulates its full reasoning trace in one shared context, while a MAS uses isolated local contexts connected by bounded relay messages. We show that, under infinite relay bandwidth, any SAS can be simulated by a MAS th …
arxiv.titleZh: 多智能体系统何时有帮助？信息瓶颈视角
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对 LLM 驱动的多智能体系统（MAS）相比单智能体系统（SAS）的优势条件尚不明确的问题，从信息瓶颈角度分析两者差异。关键洞察在于 SAS 在单一共享上下文中累积完整推理轨迹，而 MAS 通过有界中继消息连接隔离的局部上下文。理论证明在无限中继带宽下，MAS 可模拟任意 SAS，但有限带宽下 MAS 因压缩中继消息而可能性能劣于 SAS，且优势仅出现在任务可分解且子任务独立性强的场景。这一框架为设计更高效的 MAS 提供了信息论指导。

arxiv.title: ToolSciVer: Multimodal Scientific Claim Verification with Visual Tool Augmented Reinforcement Learning
arxiv.abstract: Multimodal Scientific Claim Verification (MSCV) requires models to verify scientific claims using visually grounded evidence from papers, including figures, tables, charts, and textual context. However, existing methods often fail because they struggle to locate decisive visual evidence, accurately read structured scientific visuals, and integrate multimodal observations into reliable reasoning. We introduce ToolSciVer, the first tool-augmented framework for MSCV to our knowledge. ToolSciVer equips a VLM with three type-aware visual tools, table row/column focus, chart-to-structure parsing, an …
arxiv.titleZh: ToolSciVer：基于视觉工具增强强化学习的多模态科学声明验证
arxiv.summaryZh: 多模态科学声明验证要求模型利用论文中的图表与文本上下文作为视觉证据，但现有方法难以定位关键视觉信息并整合多模态观察。ToolSciVer是首个将视觉工具增强与强化学习结合的框架，为视觉语言模型配备表格行列聚焦、图表结构解析等类型感知工具，有效提升了验证准确性。该方法为自动化科学事实核查提供了新范式，适用于学术内容审核与可信度评估。

arxiv.title: A Methodology for Auditable Trustworthiness Levels in AI Lifecycle Governance
arxiv.abstract: AI governance increasingly requires judgments about whether an AI system remains adequately trustworthy over time, whether observed changes are tolerable, and how such judgments should be documented in a transparent and contestable way. Yet existing work on AI trustworthiness remains either too high-level to support lifecycle monitoring and reassessment or too narrowly metric-driven to connect with governance needs. We therefore propose a lightweight methodology for auditable trustworthiness levels in AI governance. The methodology has two components: a formal framework for representing and le …
arxiv.titleZh: AI生命周期治理中可审计信任水平的方法论
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对AI治理中缺乏可审计、透明的信任度判断方法的问题，提出一种轻量级方法论，包含形式化表示框架和审计流程，用于记录和跟踪AI系统在生命周期中的可信度变化。该方法弥补了高层原则与具体指标间的空白，支持持续监控与重新评估，使治理决策可追溯且可争议，适用于需要长期维护可信度的AI系统。

arxiv.title: CRAFT: Clustering Rubrics to Diagnose Weak LLM Capabilities and Generate Targeted Fine-Tuning Data
arxiv.abstract: Evaluations should do more than measure a models current performance. They should tell us what to fix for the next model iteration and provide a way to generate targeted post training data. Most evaluation pipelines identify weak examples, topics, or categories, but they leave the underlying capability failure implicit: they say where a model fails, not why. We introduce CRAFT, a method that converts any rubric based evaluation dataset into a model specific diagnosis of weak capabilities. CRAFT treats each grading criterion as a capability probe: it extracts a capability description from every …
arxiv.titleZh: CRAFT: 通过聚类评分标准诊断LLM薄弱能力并生成针对性精调数据
arxiv.summaryZh: 现有评估大多仅指出模型失败的样本或主题，无法揭示背后的能力缺陷。CRAFT将评分标准视为能力探针，提取每个标准的描述并聚类，形成模型特定的薄弱能力诊断，据此自动生成针对性精调数据。该方法在一系列基准上准确识别能力短板，并通过精调显著提升模型对应表现，为迭代式模型改进提供了可操作的反馈。

arxiv.title: Rate-Utility Frontiers for Language Encodings: Comparing Tokens, Bytes, and Pixels Under Controlled Linguistic Content
arxiv.abstract: Language models encode text as subword tokens, raw bytes, or rendered pixels, but these encodings are usually compared under modeling constraints that expose different amounts of linguistic content to models across different languages. We instead ask what each encoding preserves when both the content and the downstream capacity are controlled. Using verified parallel sentences across thirteen languages and five scripts, we compare tokens, bytes, and pixels through a shared bottleneck whose width is swept to trace rate-utility frontiers. This separates three quantities that are often conflated: …
arxiv.titleZh: 语言编码的速率-效用前沿：控制语言内容下Token、字节与像素的对比
arxiv.summaryZh: 研究如何在控制语言内容量和下游容量的条件下，系统比较Subword Token、原始字节和渲染像素三种文本编码的保真度。采用覆盖13种语言5种文字的验证平行句，通过共享信息瓶颈并扫描瓶颈宽度，绘制速率-效用前沿曲线，以此分离常被混为一谈的编码效率、语言内容熵和模型容量等因素。结果表明不同编码在不同速率区域的效用存在显著差异，为多语言场景下语言模型的输入编码选择提供了量化依据。

arxiv.title: Harmonizing AI Safety Thresholds
arxiv.abstract: Frontier AI companies have published capability thresholds that differ substantially, making it difficult for third parties to verify whether a threshold has been crossed or to compare requirements across companies. Moreover, without common minimum thresholds, risk mitigation may be inconsistent, creating a potential race to the bottom in safety standards. We develop a methodology for deriving harmonized thresholds across three risk domains. For misuse risks (cyber and biological), we take expected harm as the key primitive and use an explicit risk-modeling approach that accounts for risk chan …
arxiv.titleZh: 协调人工智能安全阈值
arxiv.summaryZh: 解决前沿AI公司安全能力阈值不一致导致的第三方验证困难和潜在安全标准逐底竞争问题。以预期危害为核心度量，在误用风险（网络、生物）等领域采用显式风险建模方法，推导出跨三个风险领域的协调阈值。该方法通过统一的风险原语和建模流程，为不同公司构建一致的最低安全标准提供基础，有助于避免安全标准竞赛并促进负责任的AI部署。

arxiv.title: The Honest Quorum Problem: Epistemic Byzantine Fault Tolerance for Agentic Infrastructure
arxiv.abstract: State machine replication (SMR) and Byzantine fault-tolerant (BFT) consensus guarantee agreement despite a bounded number of arbitrary, colluding faulty participants. However, these guarantees rely on participants outside this set correctly executing the protocol's transition semantics. Agentic validators expose a weaker boundary: an authenticated, responsive, non-equivocating, and protocol-compliant reasoning participant may still endorse a semantically invalid transition due to reasoning errors. We call this failure mode an epistemic fault, and the collective phenomenon the Honest Quorum Pro …
arxiv.titleZh: 诚实多数问题：面向智能体基础设施的认知拜占庭容错
arxiv.summaryZh: 在拜占庭容错共识中，即便参与者认证有效、响应及时且不矛盾，仍可能因推理错误而认可语义无效的状态转换，这类新型故障称为认知错误。研究定义诚实多数问题，将拜占庭容错扩展为认知拜占庭容错，以显式建模协议合规但推理出错的行为。该框架为智能体基础设施中的复制状态机提供了更精细的安全模型，适用于依赖自主推理的分布式智能体系统。

arxiv.title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training
arxiv.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become central to improving large language models (LLMs) on complex reasoning tasks, yet RL post-training is largely studied in isolation from the pretraining that precedes it. As a result, two basic questions remain open: (1) how do pretraining choices (model size, data) shape the returns to RL compute, and (2) what does RL actually do to the model? These questions are difficult to study in the standard LLM setting: pretraining corpora are vast and uncontrolled, making it hard to attribute behaviors to pretraining versus RL, and systematic compute sweeps across …
arxiv.titleZh: 理解推理：从预训练到后训练
arxiv.summaryZh: 通过控制预训练因素（模型规模、数据）并系统扫描计算量，研究揭示了预训练如何影响后续强化学习（RL）后训练的收益，以及RL到底对模型做了什么。实验发现，更大模型和更高质量预训练数据能显著放大RL带来的推理性能提升；RL主要强化现有推理模式而非注入新知识。这些结论为在预训练与RL后训练之间合理分配算力提供了指导，对构建强推理能力的大语言模型具有实践意义。

arxiv.title: DADiff: Diffusion-Driven Cross-Domain Policy Adaptation for Reinforcement Learning
arxiv.abstract: Transferring policies across domains poses a vital challenge in reinforcement learning, due to the dynamics mismatch between the source and target domains. In this paper, we consider the setting of online dynamics adaptation, where policies are trained in the source domain with sufficient data, while only limited interactions with the target domain are allowed. There are a few existing works that address the dynamics mismatch by employing domain classifiers, value-guided data filtering, or representation learning. Instead, we study the domain adaptation problem from a generative modeling persp …
arxiv.titleZh: DADiff: 扩散驱动的跨域策略适应用于强化学习
arxiv.summaryZh: 解决强化学习中源域和目标域动力学不匹配的跨域策略适应问题。从生成建模视角出发，利用扩散模型学习状态转移分布，将源域训练的策略适应到目标域，目标域仅需少量在线交互。在多个连续控制任务中，该方法性能超越基于域分类器和价值引导过滤等现有方法，验证了生成式方法在动力学适应中的有效性，为机器人仿真到真实迁移等场景提供新方案。

arxiv.title: Neural spectroscopy of AlphaFold2 reveals encoded protein conformational landscapes
arxiv.abstract: AlphaFold2's 93 million parameters, shaped by the evolutionary record of protein structure encoded in the Protein Data Bank and in sequence alignments, are conventionally treated only as machinery for converting sequence to structure. We propose they are also a scientific object that can be analyzed directly: a learned encoding of protein conformational organization that can be probed and characterized. By smoothing the Evoformer's weight tensors with a Gaussian convolution and scaling the result, we show that the trained model produces physically structured conformational landscapes. Under pe …
arxiv.titleZh: AlphaFold2的神经光谱学揭示其编码的蛋白质构象景观
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对AlphaFold2内部参数是否直接编码蛋白质构象组织的问题，通过对Evoformer权重张量进行高斯卷积平滑与缩放，提出了一种“神经光谱学”分析方法。结果显示训练后的模型能够生成物理意义明确的构象景观，表明其不仅可用于结构预测，还可作为研究蛋白质构象动态的科学对象。这一发现为直接探查AlphaFold2学习到的构象编码提供了实验框架，有望应用于蛋白质功能态系综模拟与别构调控机制解析。

arxiv.title: Controlling Implicit Shortcut Reliance in L2 Spoken English Auto-markers
arxiv.abstract: Increasingly, speech and language processing tasks take either audio or text directly rather than extracting features from these as the input to the classifier or regressor. Often these systems make use of complex, for example transformer-based, processes that have the ability to derive highly non-linear mappings between the input and the output. Unfortunately these systems can also learn ''shortcuts'' where the classifier is overly reliant on particular aspects of the input to yield the output. For the task of language proficiency assessment, this over-reliance can enable learners to increase …
arxiv.titleZh: 控制二语英语口语自动评分中的隐式捷径依赖
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对二语英语口语自动评分系统中复杂模型（如Transformer）常学习到与语言能力无关的隐式捷径，导致评分偏差，提出控制模型对非关键特征过度依赖的方法。通过约束模型关注语言学相关声学或文本特征，削弱捷径效应。实验表明该方法有效降低了捷径依赖，使评分更准确反映真实口语水平，适用于教育评估中的自动口语评分系统以提升公平性。

arxiv.title: Pick-to-Learn Calibration of an MPC Policy for an Origin-to-Destination Flight Problem
arxiv.abstract: This paper illustrates the Pick-to-Learn methodology applied to the calibration of a Model Predictive Control policy. While developed around a specific example, the presentation is meant to highlight a methodology of broad applicability. The example concerns an aircraft traveling from an origin point to a destination point in the presence of uncertain crosswinds and a low-connectivity zone that should be avoided. The MPC policy is parameterized by two hyperparameters, which are selected from data by the P2L procedure. Starting from a dataset of 400 wind realizations, also called scenarios, P2L …
arxiv.titleZh: Pick-to-Learn 方法校准 MPC 策略：起点到终点飞行问题
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对起点到终点的飞行问题，考虑不确定侧风和需避开的低连通区域，模型预测控制（MPC）策略由两个超参数决定。通过 Pick-to-Learn 方法，从包含 400 个风场实现的场景数据集中自动选择最优超参数，实现策略校准。结果表明该方法有效克服环境不确定性，确保飞行安全，展示了 Pick-to-Learn 在复杂控制任务中数据驱动参数选择的广泛适用性。

arxiv.title: Physics-Based Deep Spatiotemporal Hyperlocal Radar Nowcasting with a Multi-Variable U-Net for High-Resolution Precipitation Forecasting
arxiv.abstract: Precipitation nowcasting over the immediate 10-90 min period is important for flood management and real-time decision-making in urban regions. Conventional short-range forecasting with high-resolution numerical weather prediction requires frequent data assimilation, model initialization, and spin-up, introducing computational latency. Machine learning provides an alternative by learning storm evolution directly from high-frequency observations and producing forecasts quickly after training. This is particularly relevant for Mumbai, India, where monsoon convection, land-sea interactions, and lo …
arxiv.titleZh: 基于物理的深度时空超本地雷达临近预报：一种用于高分辨率降水预测的多变量U-Net
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对城市洪水管理中10–90分钟短时降水预报的计算延迟问题，提出一种物理约束驱动的深度时空多变量U-Net模型。该方法直接从高频雷达观测中学习风暴演变，无需频繁同化与初始化，显著加快预报生成。模型特别针对印度孟买季风对流与海陆相互作用等复杂条件设计，为超本地高分辨率降水预测提供了可行的实时方案。

arxiv.title: HCIG: A Hierarchical Cross-Modal Incongruity Graph Network for Multimodal Sarcasm and Cyberbullying Detection
arxiv.abstract: Multimodal sarcasm and cyberbullying detection remain challenging because the intended meaning often emerges from incongruity between textual and visual information rather than from either modality alone. Existing multimodal approaches primarily rely on feature fusion or cross-modal attention, which may not effectively capture hierarchical semantic inconsistencies across different levels of representation. To address this limitation, this paper proposes HCIG (Hierarchical Cross-modal Incongruity Graph Network), a novel framework that models cross-modal incongruity at token, phrase, and global …
arxiv.titleZh: HCIG：面向多模态讽刺与网络欺凌检测的层次化跨模态不一致图网络
arxiv.summaryZh: 多模态讽刺与网络欺凌检测的难点在于图文信息经常表里不一，仅依赖单一模态或简单融合难以捕捉语义冲突。该工作构建层次化跨模态不一致图网络HCIG，在词元、短语和全局三个层面分别建立图文对比图结构，通过图推理将细粒度矛盾汇聚为高层语义冲突信号。在公开数据集上的实验证实，HCIG显著超越现有融合与注意力方法，F1分数提升明显，表明显式建模层次化不一致对理解多模态隐含意图至关重要。

arxiv.title: JoyNexus: Service-Oriented Multi-Tenant Post-Training for VLA Models
arxiv.abstract: The post-training of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models is essential due to the diversity of simulators, robot embodiments, and task objectives. Existing compute services, whether offered as direct accelerator rental or batch-workload submission, typically allocate an exclusive set of GPU and CPU resources to a single tenant. While this paradigm maximizes client flexibility, it burdens users with infrastructure adaptation, and the fixed card-hour accounting model renders short or bursty workloads both expensive for tenants and inefficient for the service provider. To address these challenges, …
arxiv.titleZh: JoyNexus: 面向服务的多租户VLA模型后训练
arxiv.summaryZh: 视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型后训练需适应多样的仿真器、机器人形态和任务目标，但现有独占式GPU服务以固定卡时计费，使短时突发工作负载昂贵且资源利用低效。JoyNexus构建了一个面向服务的多租户后训练平台，通过细粒度任务分解、动态资源共享与弹性调度，实现按实际使用计费，消除用户基础设施适配负担。实验表明，与传统独占模式相比，JoyNexus大幅降低了短工作负载的成本，显著提升吞吐，为大规模、高频率VLA模型迭代提供了经济高效的后训练基础设施。

arxiv.title: Frontier Language Models Struggle to Copy: Text Can Be Better Viewed in 2D
arxiv.abstract: While large language models (LLMs) can solve advanced reasoning problems in seconds, we show that even frontier models fail to perform a much simpler operation: exactly copying an input string that lies well within their context windows. We attribute this failure to positional encodings in Transformer architectures, whose inductive bias favors copying through a shortcut based on matching local contexts rather than carefully locating the corresponding input positions. To address this issue, we introduce 2D-RoPE, which organizes text into a 2D grid rather than a 1D sequence and assigns each toke …
arxiv.titleZh: 前沿语言模型难以复制：文本的二维视角更佳
arxiv.summaryZh: 前沿语言模型能解决复杂推理，但连上下文窗口内字符串的精确复制也常失败，根源在于Transformer位置编码偏重局部上下文匹配的捷径。为此提出的2D-RoPE将文本排列成二维网格并赋予二维位置编码，强制模型精准定位输入位置。实验表明该方案有效缓解复制错误，适用于需忠实复现文本的生成场景。

arxiv.title: LLM-Powered Agentic AI for 5G/6G Networks: A Tutorial and Survey on Architectures, Protocols, and Standardization
arxiv.abstract: Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI), enabled by Large Language Models, marks a shift from rule-based automation toward autonomous, goal-driven control of Next-Generation Networks (NGNs). Existing surveys treat the two domains in isolation, leaving protocol integration, evaluation, and standardization alignment underexplored. To address this gap, a two-part tutorial-and-survey is presented. Part I formalises the control, management, and AI-native planes of 5G and 6G. It then covers the foundations of agentic systems: reasoning, planning, tool use, multi-agent coordination, and evaluation. Part …
arxiv.titleZh: 面向5G/6G网络的LLM驱动型Agentic AI：架构、协议与标准化的教程与综述
arxiv.summaryZh: LLM赋能的Agentic AI正推动下一代网络从规则自动化迈向自主目标驱动控制，但现有综述缺乏对协议集成、评估和标准化对齐的探讨。该教程与综述分两部分：第一部分形式化5G和6G的控制、管理及AI原生平面，并覆盖智能体系统的推理、规划、工具使用、多智能体协作与评估基础；第二部分深入架构、协议与标准化细节。该工作为在5G/6G中部署LLM驱动的自主智能体提供了体系化参考框架，适用于网络智能运维与自治场景。

arxiv.title: Spatial Normalization for Cross-Domain Retinal Layer Segmentation in Optical Coherence Tomography
arxiv.abstract: Retinal layer segmentation in Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) is a fundamental step for extracting quantitative biomarkers of retinal structure. Indeed, there is a growing interest in the analysis of OCTs in the context of neurodegenerative diseases. However, segmentation remains challenging due to speckle noise, shadowing artifacts, low contrast between adjacent layers, anatomical variability across subjects, and domain shifts arising from different acquisition protocols and clinical populations. While deep learning methods have achieved remarkable performance, their robustness and general …
arxiv.titleZh: 跨域OCT视网膜层分割的空间归一化
arxiv.summaryZh: 针对光学相干断层扫描（OCT）视网膜层分割中因设备、群体差异导致的域偏移问题，提出空间归一化方法。首先通过几何变换将视网膜结构对齐至统一参考空间，标准化曲率与厚度，消除解剖变异和成像差异；随后结合深度学习网络进行分割。跨多个OCT数据集的实验表明，该方法显著提升跨域分割的Dice系数，缩小域内外性能差距，增强模型泛化能力，适用于多中心临床研究和神经退行性疾病生物标志物提取。

arxiv.title: When Model Merging Rivals Joint Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning: A Task-Vector Geometry Analysis
arxiv.abstract: Model merging is promoted as a substitute for joint multi-task training, yet in the reinforcement-learning setting this substitution is essentially never tested against the baseline it claims to replace: methods merge independently released agents precisely because a joint model is unavailable. We build the missing comparison. Training difficulty-1 and difficulty-2 Qwen3-8B specialists on the AppWorld agent benchmark with LOOP, we merge them (TIES, RAM+) and pit the result against a jointly trained model on the same data. On task-goal completion, merging matches joint RL -- and every merge var …
arxiv.titleZh: 当模型合并媲美联合多任务强化学习：一项任务向量几何分析
arxiv.summaryZh: 模型合并常被作为联合多任务训练的替代方案，但在强化学习中从未真正与联合训练基线比较。在AppWorld基准上，训练不同难度的Qwen3-8B专家模型，并用TIES和RAM+方法合并，结果在任务目标完成上与联合训练模型表现相当。这证实了合并足以匹敌联合RL，为高效构建多能力智能体提供了新途径。
